title: Lifestyle Index
fullTitle: Lifestyle Index - B2B API-as-Service Risk Scoring Platform
domain: FinTech | B2B API Infrastructure | Risk Analytics
description: FastAPI B2B gateway exposing proprietary risk scores to external partner companies with API key authentication, background scoring jobs, rate limiting, analytics, admin dashboards, and interactive UI/UX.
overview: Lifestyle Index is a B2B API-as-Service platform built at IIFL Samasta that exposes proprietary risk scores to external partner companies. The system features a FastAPI gateway with API key authentication, background scoring jobs, rate limiting, and comprehensive analytics. It includes admin dashboards for monitoring partner usage, dynamic score cards for risk visualization, and an interactive UI/UX for internal stakeholders.

features.label: B2B API Gateway
features.description: FastAPI-based gateway exposing proprietary risk scores to external partner companies.

features.label: API Key Authentication
features.description: Secure partner authentication with API key management and access control.

features.label: Background Scoring Jobs
features.description: Asynchronous risk score computation with job queue management.

features.label: Rate Limiting
features.description: Per-partner rate limiting to ensure fair usage and system stability.

features.label: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Admin dashboards for monitoring API usage, partner metrics, and scoring analytics.

features.label: Dynamic Score Cards
features.description: Interactive risk score visualization with dynamic card-based UI.

features.label: Interactive UI/UX
features.description: Internal stakeholder interface for score management and partner oversight.

algorithms.name: Risk Scoring Engine
algorithms.description: Proprietary risk score computation based on lifestyle and financial indicators.

algorithms.name: Rate Limiting
algorithms.description: Token bucket or sliding window rate limiting per API key.

modules.name: Scoring Engine
modules.responsibility: Background risk score computation and caching

modules.name: Partner Management
modules.responsibility: API key provisioning, usage tracking, access control

modules.name: Analytics Module
modules.responsibility: Usage metrics, partner dashboards, score analytics

modules.name: Admin UI
modules.responsibility: Internal dashboards, dynamic score cards, partner oversight
